node.data: {"V31":{"lit":"մեծահաւատու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104336851","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104336851","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_133332 copy"},"n":"մեծահաւատութի"},"M3119":{"lit":"մեծահաւ<lb xml:id=\"l104279011\" facs=\"#z104279011\" n=\"21\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ատու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104279010","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104279010","n":"20"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-137a"},"n":"մեծահաւատութի"},"M3531":{"lit":"մեծահաւատու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104372612","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104372612","n":"16"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3531.0284b"},"n":"մեծահաւատութի"},"M5871":{"lit":"մեծահաւատու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104443182","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104443182","n":"14"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"5871.0122"},"n":"մեծահաւատութի"},"M2176":{"lit":"մեծահաւա<lb xml:id=\"l104149641\" facs=\"#z104149641\" n=\"5\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>","line":{"facs":"#z104149640","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104149640","n":"4"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"2176-088a"},"n":"մեծահաւատութի"}}
